title: Glassworks of Correspondence
public_claim: Glassworks of Correspondence is a MuranoOS room handoff for managing metaphor, allegory, correspondence, and interpretive transfer.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes a metaphor or allegorical pattern through source, target, transfer logic, distortion risk, interpretive limit, and reuse decision so symbolic language remains governed rather than ornamental.
